DSIR: Data Science Infrastructure for Global Health in R

Source: R/DSIR-package.R
DSIR-package.Rd

A small, opinionated toolkit for global health data analysis. It bundles a publication-ready ggplot2 theme (theme_dsi()), sensible flextable defaults (dsi_flextable_defaults()), a quick pie chart helper (ggpie()), regional country-code datasets (wpro_cty), and thin clients for the WHO Global Health Observatory API (gho_indicators(), gho_data(), gho_dimensions()) and the UN Sustainable Development Goals API (sdg_goals(), sdg_targets(), sdg_indicators(), sdg_areas(), sdg_data()).

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/shanlong-who/DSIR

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/shanlong-who/DSIR/issues
